title: Apple Store App May Soon Use an AI-Powered Assistant to Help Sell You Things
summary: Apple may soon use its knowledge of your shopping habits to recommend products when you’re browsing its store app for new gadgets, accessories, and more. The shopping assistant may also be helpful for those looking for an answer to technical questions.
